articles.title: Women's T20 World Cup 2026 warm-up: Ireland beat Bangladesh; Scotland thump Pakistan
articles.description: Canning and Maguire starred for Ireland, while Bryce's 43-ball 94 took Scotland to a DLS win

articles.title: Gaikwad 101 trumps Arachchige 74 as India A win thriller against Sri Lanka A
articles.description: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi provided a tantalising glimpse of his potential before he was dismissed for 14 off 12 balls

articles.title: Lord's pitch rated as 'unsatisfactory' following England's first Test win
articles.description: ICC also hands out demerit point to Gadaffi Stadium for third ODI between Pakistan and Australia

articles.title: Rana and Mosaddek star as Bangladesh end 21-year wait with crushing win
articles.description: Australia dropped four catches then lost early wickets in the chase before Nahid Rana's pace did the damage

articles.title: Suthar's debut six-for powers India to their biggest Test win
articles.description: After Suthar helped skittle Afghanistan for 152 in their first innings, Washington Sundar and Kuldeep Yadav sealed the win

articles.title: Confident Bangladesh pose Australia a fresh challenge after 15-year wait for an ODI series
articles.description: While spin dominated in Pakistan, Australia could find pace playing more of a role this series

articles.title: Atkinson five-for seals England win on up-and-down Lord's pitch
articles.description: The pitch made batting so treacherous that a wicket fell every 24.9 balls, the quickest rate in a Test in England since 1907

articles.title: Tamim Iqbal elected new BCB president
articles.description: The former Bangladesh captain will serve a four-year term, having already completed two months as the president of an ad-hoc committee

articles.title: Shreyas confirmed as India's T20I captain; Suryakumar dropped
articles.description: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi has been picked in an India squad for the first time

articles.title: Reports: Ben Stokes considering retirement from international cricket after nightclub melee
articles.description: Based on the reports, Stokes is currently at his home in the northeast of England, weighing his options.

articles.title: Matthew Hayden poised to be named coach of Glasgow-based franchise in inaugural ETPL
articles.description: The latest franchise league is set to be played between August 26 and September 20 across the Netherlands and Ireland.

articles.title: County Championship 2026: Kent announce the signing of Bangladesh's Hasan Mahmud
articles.description: The 26-year-old will be available for selection when they travel to the North West to take on Lancashire on Friday, June 12.

articles.title: Women’s World Cup 2026: ‘You can't be brave without being scared’ - Charlie Dean opens up on handling pressure ahead of England's title bid
articles.description: "I think it's important for us to talk about the pressure. We know that eyes are on us and people want us to do well. We know that if we're on our best day and we perform," said Dean.

articles.title: Johan Botha steps down as Queensland and Brisbane Heat Head Coach
articles.description: Botha becomes the third state and Big Bash League coach to depart this year.
